Riyadh is the seat of government, embassies, and ministries, hosting important events every year. Originally, Riyadh was built on a field of roses, where it got its name in Arabic. Yet, the city is distinguished by skyscrapers, fine hotels, luxury restaurants, and large shopping malls.
Sharm El Sheikh is an Egyptian resort located between the Red Sea and the Sinai desert. It would blow up your mind with its beautiful underwater coral reefs and landscapes.

An e-ticket is a digital version of your traditional paper ticket, which serves as proof of your flight reservation. Once your payment is successfully processed and your booking is confirmed, your e-ticket will be emailed to you instantly. This email will contain all the important details of your flight, like your itinerary, seat information, and booking reference. In addition to the email, a backup copy of your e-ticket will also be available in your account on the Almosafer app and website, so you can access it anytime you need it before or during your travel.

We offer a variety of secure payment options, including major credit and debit cards, Mada in Saudi Arabia, KNET in Kuwait, and convenient instalment or 'Book Now, Pay Later' plans such as Tabby and Tamara. All payments are processed through encrypted and trusted banking partner gateways, ensuring your information is fully protected. For added security, your card details are never stored in our systems.

Almosafer’s system is directly integrated with airline suppliers, ensuring your reservation is confirmed and accurate in real time. Once your booking is completed, your e-ticket is issued instantly and sent to you right away. In the rare case that a supplier does not honour the booking, our customer support team will immediately step in to resolve the issue and secure an alternative or a full refund.

For urgent or existing bookings, the fastest way to get support is through our 24/7 dedicated channels. You can call us at 920000997 or reach us via WhatsApp at +966 55 440 0000 for immediate assistance.
